editor.title: AliveNpcs - Personality Editor
editor.description: Edit NPC personalities used by AliveNpcs AI dialogue. Changes take effect on the next conversation.
editor.select_prompt: Click on an NPC to edit their personality.
field.personality.tooltip: Describe {{npcName}}'s personality, traits, and behavior for the AI.
field.restore.tooltip: Check and save to remove custom personality and restore the original.
